fields.label: Ad Account ID
fields.helpText: Your Meta Ads account ID, including the 'act_' prefix. Find it in Ads Manager → top-left account selector.

fields.label: App ID
fields.helpText: Meta App ID from developers.facebook.com → your app → Settings → Basic.

fields.label: App Secret
fields.helpText: Meta App Secret. Keep this private — it authenticates your app to the Graph API.

healthcheck_config.description: Lists ad accounts accessible by the OAuth token — verifies scopes and token validity.

metadata.summary: Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads — pulls campaign performance via Graph API v19. Use for ad spend, CTR, CPA, ROAS, and conversion tracking across paid social on Meta surfaces.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to developers.facebook.com → My Apps → Create App (type: Business).
2. Add the 'Marketing API' product.
3. In Settings → Basic, copy App ID and App Secret.
4. In Ads Manager, copy your Ad Account ID (format act_XXXXXXXXX).
5. In Personas, paste App ID, App Secret, and Ad Account ID.
6. Click Authorize with Meta — grant ads_read + ads_management + business_management scopes.
7. Tokens are stored encrypted; refresh happens automatically.
